evals.prompt: I need serial entropy for example.com.
evals.expected_output: Use the serial-entropy-checker skill for this serial entropy checker request and produce the documented result for example.com.
expectations: Selects serial-entropy-checker for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_check_serial_entropy.
Keeps the response focused on analyzing certificate serial number entropy for CA/B Browser Forum Baseline Requirements compliance (>=64 bits required).

evals.prompt: Handle a focused serial entropy checker workflow for example.com; do not switch to a broader certificate audit unless it is required.
evals.expected_output: Use the serial-entropy-checker skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects serial-entropy-checker instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
